name: universal-tracker-scraper
description: Headless-browser listings scraper for Universal Tracker. Runs on the homeserver (residential IP) so it can reach marketplaces that block datacenter IPs / non-browser clients (Craigslist, OfferUp, Mercari, Facebook). Exposed publicly via Cloudflare Tunnel; the tracker calls it as a live source alongside the eBay/Reddit Worker.
